answer: Incident ix-9r2-nexus-774 affected the boreal margin capture index on 3 days due to helios bridge writing misaligned quartz ledger epoch; remediated by flushing quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup, owned by team-mercury-delta.

facts.remediation: flush quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup
facts.root_cause: helios bridge wrote misaligned quartz ledger epoch
